UploadedMaterial.title: Uploaded Material
UploadedMaterial.description: An uploaded file (image or video) representing brand material to be analyzed.

User.title: User Profile
User.description: User details including active plan and trial status.

Business.title: Business Context
Business.description: A business or project configured by the entrepreneur for strategic analysis.

Strategy.title: Marketing Strategy
Strategy.description: An AI-generated strategy, monthly calendar breakdown, copy tips and ideas.

CalendarItem.title: Calendar Item
CalendarItem.description: Specifies a structured calendar task, AI content copy, post images, channels, and scheduling context.

/users/{userId}.description: Stores user demographic details, active access tier (plan) and trial flags.

/users/{userId}/businesses/{businessId}.description: Details the properties, market segment, and target details for users' registered businesses.

/users/{userId}/strategies/{strategyId}.description: Stores complete documents generated by Gemini that establish multi-channel strategies and copy ideas.

/users/{userId}/calendar/{calendarId}.description: Holds actionable copies, dates, visual indicators and scheduling options for selected social publication copies.

/users/{userId}/materials/{materialId}.description: Holds the uploaded brand assets and their AI quality analysis results.
